역대상 16:1.content: They brought in God’s ark, and set it in the middle of the tent that David had pitched for it; and they offered burnt offerings and peace offerings before God.

역대상 16:2.content: When David had finished offering the burnt offering and the peace offerings, he blessed the people in Yahweh’s name.

역대상 16:3.content: He gave to everyone of Israel, both man and woman, to everyone a loaf of bread, a portion of meat, and a cake of raisins.

역대상 16:4.content: He appointed some of the Levites to minister before Yahweh’s ark, and to commemorate, to thank, and to praise Yahweh, the God of Israel:

역대상 16:5.content: Asaph the chief, and second to him Zechariah, then Jeiel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Mattithiah, Eliab, Benaiah, Obed-Edom, and Jeiel, with stringed instruments and with harps; and Asaph with cymbals, sounding aloud;

역대상 16:6.content: with Benaiah and Jahaziel the priests with trumpets continually, before the ark of the covenant of God.

역대상 16:7.content: Then on that day David first ordained to give thanks to Yahweh, by the hand of Asaph and his brothers.

역대상 16:8.content: Oh give thanks to Yahweh. Call on his name. Make what he has done known among the peoples.

역대상 16:9.content: Sing to him. Sing praises to him. Tell of all his marvelous works.

역대상 16:10.content: Glory in his holy name. Let the heart of those who seek Yahweh rejoice.

역대상 16:11.content: Seek Yahweh and his strength. Seek his face forever more.

역대상 16:12.content: Remember his marvelous works that he has done, his wonders, and the judgments of his mouth,

역대상 16:13.content: you offspring of Israel his servant, you children of Jacob, his chosen ones.

역대상 16:14.content: He is Yahweh our God. His judgments are in all the earth.

역대상 16:15.content: Remember his covenant forever, the word which he commanded to a thousand generations,

역대상 16:16.content: the covenant which he made with Abraham, his oath to Isaac.

역대상 16:17.content: He confirmed it to Jacob for a statute, and to Israel for an everlasting covenant,

역대상 16:18.content: saying, “I will give you the land of Canaan, The lot of your inheritance,”

역대상 16:19.content: when you were but a few men in number, yes, very few, and foreigners were in it.

역대상 16:20.content: They went about from nation to nation, from one kingdom to another people.

역대상 16:21.content: He allowed no man to do them wrong. Yes, he reproved kings for their sakes,

역대상 16:22.content: “Don’t touch my anointed ones! Do my prophets no harm!”

역대상 16:23.content: Sing to Yahweh, all the earth! Display his salvation from day to day.

역대상 16:24.content: Declare his glory among the nations, and his marvelous works among all the peoples.

역대상 16:25.content: For great is Yahweh, and greatly to be praised. He also is to be feared above all gods.

역대상 16:26.content: For all the gods of the peoples are idols, but Yahweh made the heavens.

역대상 16:27.content: Honor and majesty are before him. Strength and gladness are in his place.

역대상 16:28.content: Ascribe to Yahweh, you relatives of the peoples, ascribe to Yahweh glory and strength!

역대상 16:29.content: Ascribe to Yahweh the glory due to his name. Bring an offering, and come before him. Worship Yahweh in holy array.

역대상 16:30.content: Tremble before him, all the earth. The world also is established that it can’t be moved.

역대상 16:31.content: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice! Let them say among the nations, “Yahweh reigns!”

역대상 16:32.content: Let the sea roar, and its fullness! Let the field exult, and all that is in it!

역대상 16:33.content: Then the trees of the forest will sing for joy before Yahweh, for he comes to judge the earth.

역대상 16:34.content: Oh give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good, for his loving kindness endures forever.

역대상 16:35.content: Say, “Save us, God of our salvation! Gather us together and deliver us from the nations, to give thanks to your holy name, to triumph in your praise.”

역대상 16:36.content: Blessed be Yahweh, the God of Israel, from everlasting even to everlasting. All the people said, “Amen,” and praised Yahweh.

역대상 16:37.content: So he left Asaph and his brothers there before the ark of Yahweh’s covenant, to minister before the ark continually, as every day’s work required;

역대상 16:38.content: and Obed-Edom with their brothers, sixty-eight; Obed-Edom also the son of Jeduthun and Hosah to be doorkeepers;

역대상 16:39.content: and Zadok the priest, and his brothers the priests, before Yahweh’s tabernacle in the high place that was at Gibeon,

역대상 16:40.content: to offer burnt offerings to Yahweh on the altar of burnt offering continually morning and evening, even according to all that is written in Yahweh’s law, which he commanded to Israel;

역대상 16:41.content: and with them Heman and Jeduthun, and the rest who were chosen, who were mentioned by name, to give thanks to Yahweh, because his loving kindness endures forever;

역대상 16:42.content: and with them Heman and Jeduthun with trumpets and cymbals for those that should sound aloud, and with instruments for the songs of God; and the sons of Jeduthun to be at the gate.

역대상 16:43.content: All the people departed, each man to his house; and David returned to bless his house.
